summary: Frontend testing of manage-roles page after fix for infinite loading bug. MAIN BUG FIXED: Navigation from Administration tab to Roles Management page now works correctly using router.replace (previously router.push caused infinite loading). Page loads without infinite loading state. Add Role modal opens correctly. Permission hierarchy structure visible (full permissions with 'شاملة' badge, sub-permissions underneath).

issues: Modal content requires scrolling to see all permission categories - consider increasing modal height or adding clear visual indicator for scrollable content

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Infinite loading bug FIXED: router.replace used instead of router.push in admin.tsx (line 302)
✓ togglePermission function (lines 166-211) correctly implements full/sub permission logic
✓ isSubPermissionLocked function (lines 215-221) correctly checks if parent permission is selected
✓ Visual indicators for locked sub-permissions: lock icon and 'مفعّل تلقائياً' text (lines 551-572)
✓ Roles list displays correctly with permission counts and user counts
seed_data_creation: None required - existing roles data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infinite loading bug is FIXED. The manage-roles page now loads correctly when navigating from Administration tab. The key fix was changing router.push to router.replace in admin.tsx line 302. All permission hierarchy logic (full permissions auto-selecting sub-permissions, locked sub-permissions showing 'مفعّل تلقائياً') is implemented correctly in the code. Testing confirmed: 1) Navigation works without infinite loading, 2) Roles list displays correctly (مدير النظام, مدرس, موظف, طالب, etc.), 3) Add Role modal opens with blue + button, 4) Permission hierarchy structure visible with 'شاملة' badges.

navigation_from_admin_to_roles.details: Page loads correctly after clicking 'إدارة الأدوار' from Administration tab - no infinite loading

roles_list_display.details: Shows all roles with correct info: مدير النظام (27 permissions, 1 user), مدرس (9 permissions, 3 users), موظف, طالب, مشرف قسم, etc.

add_role_button.details: Blue + button in header opens 'إنشاء دور جديد' (Create New Role) modal

add_role_modal.details: Modal shows: role name input, description input, permissions section with categories

permission_hierarchy_structure.details: Permissions organized by category (الأقسام, المقررات, etc.), full permissions marked with 'شاملة' badge in orange

full_permission_visual.details: Full permissions like 'إدارة كاملة للأقسام' have orange/yellow background and 'شاملة' badge

sub_permissions_visible.details: Sub-permissions like 'عرض الأقسام' appear under their parent full permission

permission_toggle_code_logic.details: togglePermission function correctly: selects all sub-perms when full is selected, removes full when sub is deselected

locked_sub_permissions_code_logic.details: isSubPermissionLocked correctly returns true when parent full permission is selected, UI shows lock icon and 'مفعّل تلقائياً'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The infinite loading bug was caused by using router.push() instead of router.replace() when navigating from the Administration tab to internal pages. In Expo Router, router.push adds a new entry to the navigation stack, which can cause issues with component mounting/unmounting and state synchronization. router.replace replaces the current route without adding to the stack, which resolves these lifecycle issues.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed router.push(item.route) to router.replace(item.route) in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/admin.tsx line 302
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After the fix, the manage-roles page loads correctly within 5 seconds after navigation from Administration tab. No more infinite 'جاري التحميل...' state.
